title: Leviathan (disambiguation)
content:
'''Leviathan''' could refer to several things:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''''[[Leviathan]]''''', an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]].
*'''[[Lava Leviathan]]''', a vessel used by [[Baron]] [[Rubix]] during the [[Shu-Torun War|War on Shu-Torun]]
*The '''[[Leviathan Gem]]''', a [[Monarchy|royal]] jewel of the [[Nautolan]] [[species]]
*'''[[Leviathan grub]]''', a [[Species|creature]] native to [[Yavin 4]]
*'''[[Unidentified leviathan]]''', a species that lived on the [[moon]] [[Rugosa]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Leviathan Submersible Carrier]]''', a type of [[Submarine/Legends|submersible]] carrier.
*[[Leviathan (planet)|'''Leviathan''']], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]].
*[[Leviathan (Interdictor-class cruiser)|'''''Leviathan''''']], [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Interdictor-class cruiser|''Interdictor''-class cruiser]] [[Command ship/Legends|command ship]].
*[[Leviathan (Dreadnaught-class)|'''''Leviathan''''']], a [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]].
*[[Leviathan (luxury liner)|'''''Leviathan''''']], a luxury liner.
*[[Leviathan (creature)|'''Leviathan''']], bio-engineered monsters created by [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] during the [[Hundred-Year Darkness/Legends|Hundred-Year Darkness]].
**'''[[Sea Leviathan]]''', bio-engineered monster created by the [[One Sith]] on [[Dac/Legends|Dac]].
*'''[[Imperial Leviathan]]''', a predecessor to the [[World Devastator]].
*'''[[Dorumaan leviathan]]''', an oceanic mammal from [[Dorumaa]].
*[[Leviathan (Arrakan)|'''Leviathan''']], a giant squid from [[Arrakan]].
*'''[[Leviathan Power Armor]]''', a type of body armor produced by the [[Mon Calamari/Legends|Mon Calamari]].

==Out-of-universe==
*'''[[Star Wars: Jedi Academy: Leviathan|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan''''']], a comic series.
*"'''[[The Leviathan]]'''," a short story published in the [[Wikipedia:Target Corporation|Target]]-exclusive edition of ''[[Myths & Fables]]''
